top_signals.title: Brazil’s Lula Doubles Down On Oil And Rare Earths As Brazil’s Strategic Future
top_signals.summary: Brazilian President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva has explicitly linked oil exploration and rare-earth mining to Brazil's national sovereignty, declaring that the country’s subsoil resources must be used to drive domestic industrialization rather than enrich foreign nations. Speaking at Petrobras’(NYSE:PBR) giant refinery, Refinaria de Paulínia (Replan), in São Paulo, Lula emphasized that Brazil must actively extract its natural resources in a bid to secure its geopolitical and economic future.  Defying foreign…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Jinkx Monsoon’s Judy Garland musical proves drag is serious art
top_signals.summary: Jinkx Monsoon’s Judy Garland musical, review and star rating: ★★★★★ Death Drop the Musical cautiously welcomed people back to the theatre in December 2020 with one major claim to fame: that it would be the first all-drag musical. Six years ago, that felt progressive. The musical was good, but it played to drag tropes: it was [...]

top_signals.title: CLEAR token tanks 48% as Everclear winds down protocol, foundation and labs unit
top_signals.summary: Everclear achieved $500 million in monthly volume, but "never developed the commercial depth," the team said on Thursday.
